title: Eurycaulis subflavidus
taxonomy: Eurycaulis subflavidus is classified within the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its palmate leaves and single stem. Further classification places Eurycaulis subflavidus within the subfamily Arecoideae. The genus Eurycaulis is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. This classification is in line with traditional botanical classifications.
side_effects: Unfortunately, I don't have information on Eurycaulis subflavidus.
